rows.objective: UI redesign execution T1: tokenize spacing/typography/color roles and remove arbitrary spacing in shared UI primitives.
UI redesign execution T2: standardize chat surface controls and navigation shell patterns per directive (buttons, forms, active states, predictable placement).
UI redesign execution T3: begin icon normalization on high-traffic surfaces with Lucide as default.
UI redesign execution T4: migrate shared component variants (buttons/forms/cards/tables) to directive-aligned primitives with one-primary-CTA discipline per section.
UI redesign execution T5: refactor settings information architecture into grouped sections (General, Preferences, AI, Integrations, Security, System) with improved scanability.
Add a user-visible debug panel toggle during LLM waiting state (three-dot loader) to show live execution/debug details in a bottom pane.
UI redesign execution T6: perform dashboard hierarchy pass (metrics row → charts section → detailed table section) for clearer information priority.
UI redesign execution T7: complete accessibility and motion hardening pass across top journeys (keyboard/focus/contrast/reduced-motion).
Expand generation scope toward full-stack workflows so Bolt2 can scaffold backend logic/services (for example FastAPI and equivalent stacks) in addition to frontend code.
